bancr: R Client Access to the Brain And Nerve Cord (BANC) Dataset

Source: R/bancr-package.R
bancr-package.Rd

Access to the BANC 'righty' EM dataset, focussing on support for BANC autosegmentation. Organised as a wrapper around the fafbseg package.

Details

There are several online bancr resources in addition to the built-in R help documentation. These include:

  • Package README including installation details and an analysis full worked example.

  • Function reference

  • Getting help

Please see below for github source code and issues links.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/natverse/bancr

  • https://natverse.github.io/bancr/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/natverse/bancr/issues
